emergency_routing_rules.fallback_protocol: collect name, property address, and description before transferring

non_emergency_routing_rules.message_protocol: we take messages and call back next business day

call_transfer_rules.failure_message: I'm unable to connect you right now, but I'll make sure someone gets your message and calls you back as soon as possible.

integration_constraints: at least 48 hours notice for all appointments
in-person assessment required for tree removal jobs
Never schedule tree removal jobs on Mondays
Always require a signed written quote before scheduling any job over 500 dollars
after_hours_flow_summary: immediate transfer for emergencies, message taken for non-emergencies
office_hours_flow_summary: regular scheduling and quotes through primary contact
questions_or_unknowns: Failure message for call transfer not provided
Fallback protocol for emergency routing not provided
